field_changes.old:
We’ve made a handful of updates that should help the Home tab run more smoothly. 

Questions, feedback, or need help? We're here: hello@centr.com.
field_changes.new:
This release brings fixes and improvements to screen casting and adds deeper screen mirroring support, making your big-screen workouts smoother and more reliable.

Need a hand or have feedback? Reach our team anytime at hello@centr.com.
